transforms.code:
#	not_verified = [True for v in value if v['Verified']==False]
	verified = [v.get('Verified') for v in value]
	if False in verified:
		self.custom.routine.verified = False
	return value

##AutoSave Script

#		data = self.custom.routine

#Script to cause pramList to be unverified if name changed
#	system.perspective.print(origin)
	if origin == 'BindingWriteback':
		paramLists = self.custom.paramLists
		selectedList = self.custom.routine
		if paramLists:
			for paramList in paramLists:
				if paramList['key'] == selectedList['key']:
					if paramList['name'] != selectedList['name']:
						self.custom.routine.verified = False

selectedParameters = BlueRidge.Recipe.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(self.custom.selectedParameter)
	if len(selectedParameters) == 1: 
		try:
			prev_key = previousValue.value[0].value['key'].value
			curr_key = currentValue.value[0].value['key'].value
		except:
			prev_key = 0
			curr_key = 1
		if prev_key == curr_key: #cell change made, not a new row selected
			selectedParameter = selectedParameters[0] #changed data
			parameters = self.custom.parameters # list of old data
			
			prev = {}
			curr = {}
			prev['Name'] = previousValue.value[0].value['Name'].value
			curr['Name'] = currentValue.value[0].value['Name'].value
			prev['Value'] = previousValue.value[0].value['Value'].value
			curr['Value'] = currentValue.value[0].value['Value'].value
			prev['Macro Variable'] = previousValue.value[0].value['Macro Variable'].value
			curr['Macro Variable'] = currentValue.value[0].value['Macro Variable'].value
			prev['Assignment'] = previousValue.value[0].value['Assignment'].value
			curr['Assignment'] = currentValue.value[0].value['Assignment'].value
#			system.perspective.print('prev:{}'.format(prev))
#			system.perspective.print('curr:{}'.format(curr))
			
			if type(prev['Value'])!=type(curr['Value']):
				try:
					prev['Value'] = float(prev['Value'])
					curr['Value'] = float(curr['Value'])
				except:
					system.perspective.print("Value must be a number")
			
			if prev != curr: # only update on editable table data
				for i, parameter in enumerate(parameters):
					if parameter['key'] == curr_key: #find the right parameter
						selectedParameter['Verified'] = False
						parameters[i] = selectedParameter #replace old data with new data
#						system.perspective.print('Updating parameters from selectedParameter')
				self.custom.parameters = parameters
				self.custom.routine.verified = False

transforms.code:
resp = []
#	tabFormat = {'viewPath':'', 'viewParams':{'text':'TabName','verified':False}}
	paramLists = value['paramLists']
	fileTypes = value['fileTypes']
#	fileTypes.sort(key=lambda x: x['text'])
	for fileType in fileTypes:
		text = fileType['text']
		extensionTypeUUID = fileType['key']
		verified = next((p['verified'] for p in paramLists if p['extensionTypeUUID']==extensionTypeUUID),None)
		resp.append({'viewPath':'BlueRidge/Components/_Recipe/_Operation/tabData', 'viewParams':{'text':text,'verified':verified}})
	return resp

onChange.script:
#	newTableData1 = BlueRidge.Recipe.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(currentValue.value)
	newTableData = BlueRidge.Recipe.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(self.custom.tableData)
	if newTableData:
		normilizedNew  = sorted([sorted(d.items()) for d in newTableData])
		
		fileTypeKey = self.custom.fileTypeKey
		fileTypeParameter = self.custom.parameters['Key{}'.format(fileTypeKey)]
		oldTableData = BlueRidge.Recipe.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(fileTypeParameter['tableData'])
		normilizedOld  = sorted([sorted(d.items()) for d in oldTableData])
		
	#	system.perspective.print('old:{0}, new:{1}'.format(normilizedOld,normilizedNew))
		if normilizedOld != normilizedNew:
			self.custom.parameters['Key{}'.format(fileTypeKey)]['tableData']=newTableData
	#		system.perspective.print('Not the same')
		else:
	#		system.perspective.print('Same data')
			pass

config.script:
#	operation = self.view.params.operation
#	parameters = self.view.custom.parameters
#	operationEngines = self.view.custom.operationEngines
	
	data = self.view.params.operation
	data = BlueRidge.Recipe.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(data)
	data['user']=self.session.props.auth.user.userName
	resp = BlueRidge.Recipe.Operation.update(data)
	if resp == -1:
		pass

	data = self.view.custom.routine
	data = BlueRidge.Config.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(data)
	data['user']=self.session.props.auth.user.userName
	resp = BlueRidge.Recipe.ParameterList.update(data)
	if resp == -1:
#		self.custom.triggerRefresh = not self.custom.triggerRefresh
		pass
	
	datas = self.view.custom.parameters
	datas = BlueRidge.Recipe.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(datas)
	for data in datas:
		data = BlueRidge.Recipe.Util.convertWrapperObjectToJson(data)
		data['user']=self.session.props.auth.user.userName
		resp = BlueRidge.Recipe.EngineParameter.update(data)
		if resp == -1:
			pass
	
	system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshTrigger")
	
	
#	prev_name = previousValue.getValue()['name'].value
#	curr_name = currentValue.getValue()['name'].value

data = self.view.params.operation
	data = system.util.jsonEncode(data)
	resp = BlueRidge.Recipe.Operation.update(data)
#	system.perspective.print("Update Button: {}".format(resp))
	if resp == 'success':
		system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshTrigger")

#	parameters = self.view.custom.parameters
#	fileTypeKey = self.view.custom.fileTypeKey
#	tableData = parameters['Key{}'.format(fileTypeKey)]['tableData']
##	nextParamKey = len(tableData)+1
#	newParameter = {
#      "Name": "Name",
#      "Verified": False,
#      "Value": 0,
#      "Macro Variable": "Var"
#    }
#	
#	tableData.append(newParameter)
#	parameters['Key{}'.format(fileTypeKey)]['tableData'] = tableData
	data = {}
	data['parameterListUUID'] = self.view.custom.routine.key
	data['user'] = self.session.props.auth.user.userName
#	self.view.custom.routine.verified = False
	resp = BlueRidge.Recipe.EngineParameter.add(data)
	if resp == -1:
		self.view.custom.triggerRefresh = not self.view.custom.triggerRefresh
		pass

#	system.perspective.print('running')
	parameters = self.view.custom.parameters
	parameterList = self.view.custom.routine
#	system.perspective.print('parameterList1: {}'.format(parameterList))
	selectedParameter = [
	  {
	    "Verified": "",
	    "Value": "",
	    "Macro Variable": "",
	    "parameterListUUID": "",
	    "key": "",
	    "Name": ""
	  }
	]
	self.view.custom.selectedParameter = selectedParameter
	self.view.custom.selectedRow = None
	self.view.custom.routine['verified'] = True
	parameterList['verified'] = True
#	system.perspective.print('parameterList2: {}'.format(parameterList))
	BlueRidge.Recipe.ParameterList.update(parameterList)
#	system.perspective.print('verified:{}'.format(self.view.custom.routine['verified']))
	for i in range(len(parameters)):
		parameters[i]['Verified'] = True
		self.view.custom.parameters[i].Verified = True
		BlueRidge.Recipe.EngineParameter.update(parameters[i])
		
	self.view.custom.triggerRefresh = not self.view.custom.triggerRefresh
#	system.perspective.sendMessage('refreshTrigger')

messageHandlers.script:
data = payload
#	addEngine = BlueRidge.Recipe.OperationEngine.getOne(addEngineKey)
#	currentEngines = self.view.custom.operationEngines
#	currentEngines.append(addEngine)
#	self.view.custom.operationEngines = currentEngines
	data['operationUUID'] = self.view.params.operation.key
	resp = BlueRidge.Recipe.OperationEngine.add(data)
	if resp == -1:
		self.view.custom.triggerRefresh = not self.view.custom.triggerRefresh
		pass

from org.python.core import PyArray
	
	if type(payload) == PyArray:
		param = payload[0]
		#system.perspective.print(param)
	elif type(payload) == dict:
		if 'messageType' in payload.keys():
			removeKey = payload['key']
	#		operations = self.view.custom.instances
			operationEngines = self.view.custom.operationEngines
			new_operationEngines = [d for d in operationEngines if d.get('key') != removeKey]
			self.view.custom.operationEngines = new_operationEngines
			self.view.custom.selectedData = 0
	else:
		pass
